items.title: England on collision course with Messi and Argentina in World Cup semi-final grudge match
items.summary: First competitive game between teams since 2002 World Cup Georgia braced for potential flashpoints in Atlanta buildup It has been billed as one of the biggest grudge matches in the history of international football. items.title: Harry Kane fires huge warning to Argentina ahead of England World Cup semi as Lionel Messi braces for ‘special’ battle
items.summary: HARRY KANE vows England WILL improve ahead of Wednesday’s World Cup semi-final showdown with bitter rivals Argentina in Atlanta. And superstar Lionel Messi is relishing a “special” first meeting with  Thomas Tuchel’s “powerhouse” Three Lions. Kane knows England were lucky to seal a 2-1 comeback

items.title: Jude Bellingham took the plaudits vs Norway.. but John Stones was England’s key to setting up Argentina World Cup battle
items.summary: SO it’s Argentina now in the semi-final and what a prospect that’s going to be. While Jude Bellingham is rightly being praised for his brilliant two-goal performance against Norway to get us there, let’s hear it for my great mate John Stones too. items.title: Arsenal want Argentina's Alvarez - Monday's gossip
items.summary: Arsenal want to sign Atletico Madrid's Julian Alvarez, Aston Villa hijack Newcastle's move for Johan Manzambi, plus more.

items.title: Infantino opens door to 64-team World Cup
items.summary: Plans for a 64-team men's world cup are set to be picked up and assessed in detail after the 2026 tournament with Fifa boss Gianni Infantino saying football needs to be "for the whole world".

items.title: England gear up for first ever clash with Lionel Messi in World Cup semi as millions set to flood pubs to watch match
items.summary: ENGLAND were gearing up yesterday for a titanic clash with Argentina for a place in the World Cup final — and a first battle with football colossus Lionel Messi. items.title: How England lined up last time they faced Argentina with mouth-watering attack and seven-cap wildcard
items.summary: ENGLAND face Argentina in the World Cup semi-finals - 21 years since the two nations last met on the pitch. items.title: How Thomas Tuchel unlocked ‘real’ Jude Bellingham to make ace a superstar – and why it could lead to World Cup glory
items.summary: IT’S closer, now, than it’s ever been in 60 years. Six decades of anguish and frustration, near misses and what-might-have-beens.
